title: MEATER Plus Smart Meat Thermometer - Honey & Bamboo
subtitle: MEATER Plus Smart Meat
overview: The MEATER Plus makes cooking easy - monitor the temperature of meat as it cooks. It's got a built-in Bluetooth repeater in the charger, which means you'll be able to connect to the probe from up to 50 m away. It has two sensors in the probe, so you can monitor the internal meat temperature (up to 100°C) and the temperature of your oven. Need a helping hand? The Guided Cook System walks you through every step of the cooking process for tasty results every time. Good to know- The Advanced Estimator Algorithm helps you plan your meal by estimating how long to cook and rest your food- With the MEATER Masterclass, you get video-supported recipes for both indoor and outdoor cooking- The Connectivity Suite lets you monitor your cooking from a phone or tablet using Bluetooth- Extend the wireless range using MEATER Link WiFi and the MEATER Cloud- The probe is dishwasher safe, making cleanup easy- The long battery life means the probe can last up to 24 hours of cooking time

specs.value: Monitor food & check the temperature of the meat

It even keeps solid ice for two days! You'll never have to worry about leaks either. The LeakLock lid keeps everything sealed tight, whether it's in your rucksack, handbag or coat pocket. And its smooth BubbleLock interior reduces fizz loss, so your drinks stay bubbly from the first sip to the last.Good to know- The cup and lid are dishwasher safe so it's quick and easy to clean them- Its 700 ml capacity is the perfect size for taking to the office, gym or on a weekend walk- The rounded spout is comfortable and easy to drink from – no messy spills

title: CORAVIN Sparkling Wine Preservation System - Silver
subtitle: CORAVIN Sparkling Wine Preservation
overview: Ever opened a bottle of bubbly, had a glass or two, then watched the rest go flat in the fridge? The Coravin sparkling wine preservation system has a special stopper that fits snugly on most sparkling wine bottles. Pop the stopper on the open bottle, press it down firmly - that's it, your bubbles are good for up to 4 weeks. Plus, with the LED CO2 indicator, you can easily see when your bottle is fully charged or needs a new capsule.Good to know- Each CO2 capsule preserves up to 7 standard bottles, so it's great for regular use- Just tilt the bottle to release the gas - it's quick without fiddling with levers- Its internal regulator stops gassing once the pressure is right- Use the bottle sleeve when dealing with cracked or chipped bottles

title: MEATER Block Smart Meat Thermometer - Honey & Bamboo
subtitle: MEATER Block Smart Meat
overview: This MEATER Block is a wireless meat thermometer that makes cooking a breeze. It connects using WiFi, and you'll stay connected thanks to the MEATER cloud. There are four probes, each with two sensors. That means you can monitor both the internal meat temperature (up to 100°C) and temperature of your oven. Need a helping hand? The Guided Cook System walks you through every step of the cooking process, so you'll get perfect results.Good to know- The Advanced Estimator Algorithm helps you plan your meal by estimating how long to cook and rest your food- With the MEATER Masterclass, you get video-supported recipes for both indoor and outdoor cooking- Monitor your cooking using the app or using the LED screen- The probe is dishwasher safe, making cleanup easy- It's USB-C rechargeable so you won't need to switch batteries
key_features: Multiple probes with dual temperature sensors

specs.value: Monitor food & check the temperature of the meat
24 x 37 x 157 mm (H x W x D)
Meater Block Smart Meat Thermometer, Charger
Includes 4 probes, Multiple probes with dual temperature sensors, Probe clips x 4, Standalone mode, Micro USB-port, Ceramic handles, Water-resistant probe, Charger: OLED display with touch controls
Advanced estimator algorithm: Get alerts on when to remove the meat, how long to rest & when its time to eat, Set custom alerts based on the internal and ambient temperature, Guided cooking system

title: MORPHY RICHARDS 432040 Vacuum Sealer - Silver & Black
subtitle: MORPHY RICHARDS 432040 Vacuum
overview: - Seal up and go – the Morphy Richards vacuum sealer is cordless, so you can keep your food fresh - The pulse function removes the air gently, so you can safely store even delicate food like pastries or fresh berries - It comes with large and small vacuum sealer bags, so you can start using it immediately - Store your food safely and keep those harmful chemicals at bay- these bags are BPA-free - Whether it's marinated meats or ground coffee, you can seal and store both wet and dry items

specs.value: 82 x 385 x 145 mm (H x W x D)
